title: How many boards do we have in our workspaces?
excerpt:
Hello, we created about 700 boards. At this point we need: 

to know how may board we created
to extract an excel containing the list of all the boards 
Is that possible?

posts.author: l.iacona (Lucia )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we created about 700 boards. At this point we need:

  1. to know how may board we created
  2. to extract an excel containing the list of all the boards
    Is that possible?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @l.iacona ~ Welcome to the monday.com Community!

After some testing, I’m afraid we do not currently have a way to see exactly how many boards you have in your entire account and/or within each workspace. You will need to manually count them.

However, I absolutely see why this would be useful, so I would encourage you to actually post this within our Feature Feedback section of the community as this will allow you and other users to vote on your support of the feature addition and explain your own use cases for it in the comments

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
